dashboard.noApiKey: No API key configured. Enter your XC Scribe API key below and save to connect.
dashboard.apiKeyHintSaved: An API key is saved. Enter a new key to replace it.
dashboard.apiKeyHintNew: Paste your XC Scribe API key.
dashboard.fullPlatformDesc: Experience the full power of XC Scribe — bulk generation, analytics, multi-store management, and more.
dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity. Generate your first blog draft to get started.
blog.customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Add SEO headings, include a short conclusion
blog.lostConnection: Lost connection while checking generation status.
products.title: Product Descriptions
products.wooNotAvailable: AI-powered product description generation is available for WooCommerce stores. Install and activate WooCommerce to use this feature.
products.instructions: Open any product in WooCommerce and look for the <1>XC Scribe</1> box in the sidebar. Pick a language and tone, then hit Generate — AI reads the product title, categories, attributes and images, and writes a description that gets inserted directly into the editor.
products.goToProducts: Go to <1>Products</1> and open any product to try it.
metabox.description: AI analyzes this product's title, categories, attributes, and images to write a tailored description.
metabox.customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Mention free shipping, keep it under 120 words
metabox.success: Description generated and applied to the editor.
metabox.missingProductId: Save the product first so XC Scribe can read its data.
about.whatIsDesc1: XC Scribe is an AI-powered content platform that helps e-commerce stores create high-quality product descriptions and blog posts in 30+ languages. Simply select a product, choose your language and tone, and get ready-to-publish content in seconds.
about.whatIsDesc2: This WordPress plugin connects directly to your store, letting you generate and apply descriptions without leaving your admin.
about.fullPlatformOffers: The full XC Scribe platform offers:
about.featureBulk: <0>Bulk generation</0> — Generate descriptions for hundreds of products at once
about.featureStudio: <0>AI Studio</0> — Request custom content with human review
about.featureAnalytics: <0>Analytics</0> — Track content performance and token usage
about.featureMultiStore: <0>Multi-store</0> — Connect Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento 2 from one dashboard
about.featureTeam: <0>Team collaboration</0> — Invite team members with role-based access
